tuto.welcome: Welcome to <bold>Ipso</bold>! Your goal: build <bold>rows of ascending numbers</bold> to score the most points possible.
tuto.place-first: On each turn, you choose one of the cards in the <bold>center of the table</bold> and place it in your pyramid. To start, place the <bold>1</bold> card in the bottom-left slot of the pyramid.
tuto.ascending: Only <bold>ascending rows</bold> (left to right) score points. A <bold>non-ascending row</bold> is discarded at the end of the game and scores nothing.
tuto.place-second: Place the <bold>21</bold> card right next to the 1 to begin an ascending row.
tuto.same-color: An ascending row of <bold>different colors</bold> scores <bold>1 point per card</bold>. If all the cards are the <bold>same color</bold>, it scores <bold>2 points per card</bold>.
tuto.stars: Some cards have <bold>stars</bold>. Each star visible at the end of the game scores <bold>1 extra point</bold>.
tuto.place-third: Take the <bold>26</bold> card and place it next to the 21 to extend your magenta row.
tuto.star-card: Once all 14 of your cards are revealed, you can discard your <bold>Star card</bold> (at the top) to draw the top card of the draw pile and <bold>replace any card</bold> in your pyramid, or keep it for <bold>+3 points</bold> at the end of the game.
tuto.end-game:
In short, build ascending rows, ideally of the same color.
It's your turn now — good luck!
log.reveal-card: <card/> moves to the center of the table
header.play-card.you: You must choose a card and place it in your pyramid
header.play-card.player: {player} must choose a card and place it in their pyramid
header.use-star-card.you: You can <use>use your Star card</use> or <pass>pass</pass>
header.use-star-card.you.place-or-discar: Place the drawn card in your pyramid or <discard>discard it</discard>
header.use-star-card.player: {player} can use their Star card to draw the top card of the draw pile and replace one of their cards
help.number-card.title: Numbered Card
help.number-card.description: Each card has a <bold>number from 1 to 90</bold> and a <bold>color</bold> among five. Some cards also have <bold>stars</bold> (1 or 2) that score bonus points.
help.number-card.colors: There are <bold>5 colors</bold>: green, magenta, blue, yellow, and orange.
help.number-card.pyramid.title: The pyramid
help.number-card.pyramid.description: Each player builds a pyramid of <bold>14 cards</bold> organized in 4 rows. At the start of the game, all cards are <bold>face down</bold>. Each turn, you choose a card from the <bold>center of the table</bold> and place it face up in your pyramid, replacing a face-down card.
help.number-card.scoring.title: Score
help.number-card.scoring.description: At the end of the game, each row of your pyramid scores points if its cards are in <bold>ascending order</bold> from left to right:
help.number-card.scoring.same-color: An ascending row scores <bold>1 point per card</bold>. If all cards are the <bold>same color</bold>, it scores <bold>2 points per card</bold>. A non-ascending row is discarded and scores nothing.
help.number-card.stars.title: Stars
help.number-card.stars.description: Each star visible on your cards at the end of the game scores <bold>1 extra point</bold>.
help.star-card.title: Star Card
help.star-card.description: Each player has <bold>one Star card</bold>, placed at the top of their pyramid at the start of the game.
help.star-card.use.title: Use
help.star-card.use.description: Once all <bold>14 cards in your pyramid are revealed</bold>, you can discard your Star card to draw the top card of the draw pile and replace any card in your pyramid. You can also choose to <bold>pass</bold> and keep your Star card.
help.star-card.bonus.title: End-of-game bonus
help.star-card.bonus.description: If your Star card is still in your pyramid at the end of the game, it scores <bold>3 extra points</bold>.
oddOrEven.help: The rules remain unchanged. After the regular scoring, add 1 point per card for any row that contains all odd or all even numbers.
oddOrEven.dialog.title: Variant: Odd and even rows
oddOrEven.dialog.intro: The <bold>"Odd and even rows"</bold> variant is enabled for this game.
oddOrEven.dialog.rule: The rules remain unchanged. After the regular scoring, <bold>add 1 point per card</bold> for any row that contains <bold>all odd numbers</bold> or <bold>all even numbers</bold>.
oddOrEven.dialog.example: Example: a row <bold>4 – 8 – 20 – 42</bold> (all even) scores <bold>+4 points</bold> on top of the regular score.
last-turn.title: Last turn
last-turn.intro: All 14 of your cards are face up — this is your <bold>last turn</bold> before final scoring. You have two options with your <bold>Star card</bold>:
last-turn.use: <bold>Discard it</bold> to draw the top card of the draw pile and replace any card in your pyramid.
last-turn.keep: <bold>Keep it</bold> to score <bold>+3 points</bold> at the end of the game.
